## Meeting Purpose

[Deep dive feedback session on GrowthX's content creation for Aembit, focusing on challenges and improvements.](https://fathom.video/share/9WGGG9Bb4reaWiHuPc5-HaosCfz4XSbA?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Content velocity is improving (2 published → 4 more pending), but technical accuracy remains a challenge (50% valid)](https://fathom.video/share/9WGGG9Bb4reaWiHuPc5-HaosCfz4XSbA?tab=summary&timestamp=90.0)
  - [Need to balance broad topics (where GrowthX excels) with deep technical content (where improvement is needed)](https://fathom.video/share/9WGGG9Bb4reaWiHuPc5-HaosCfz4XSbA?tab=summary&timestamp=216.0)
  - [Implementing client's perspective/voice crucial for less generic content](https://fathom.video/share/9WGGG9Bb4reaWiHuPc5-HaosCfz4XSbA?tab=summary&timestamp=631.0)
  - [New GrowthX platform features (fact-checking, AI editor) show promise for addressing issues](https://fathom.video/share/9WGGG9Bb4reaWiHuPc5-HaosCfz4XSbA?tab=summary&timestamp=825.0)

## Topics

### Content Velocity and Quality

  - [Progress: 2 published articles in 6 weeks → 4 more pending publication](https://fathom.video/share/9WGGG9Bb4reaWiHuPc5-HaosCfz4XSbA?tab=summary&timestamp=90.0)
  - [Goal: 6-8 articles/week (currently seems far off)](https://fathom.video/share/9WGGG9Bb4reaWiHuPc5-HaosCfz4XSbA?tab=summary&timestamp=126.0)
  - [Issues:](https://fathom.video/share/9WGGG9Bb4reaWiHuPc5-HaosCfz4XSbA?tab=summary&timestamp=152.0)
      - [Classic AI problems with content](https://fathom.video/share/9WGGG9Bb4reaWiHuPc5-HaosCfz4XSbA?tab=summary&timestamp=169.0)
      - [Technical validity at \~50%](https://fathom.video/share/9WGGG9Bb4reaWiHuPc5-HaosCfz4XSbA?tab=summary&timestamp=160.0)
      - [Concerns about scaling while maintaining quality](https://fathom.video/share/9WGGG9Bb4reaWiHuPc5-HaosCfz4XSbA?tab=summary&timestamp=195.0)

### Technical Depth and Accuracy

  - [Example: Spiffy (open-source project) article](https://fathom.video/share/9WGGG9Bb4reaWiHuPc5-HaosCfz4XSbA?tab=summary&timestamp=240.0)
      - [Initial draft rejected outright](https://fathom.video/share/9WGGG9Bb4reaWiHuPc5-HaosCfz4XSbA?tab=summary&timestamp=249.0)
      - [New workflow developed, resulting in much more technical content](https://fathom.video/share/9WGGG9Bb4reaWiHuPc5-HaosCfz4XSbA?tab=summary&timestamp=261.0)
  - [Challenge: Achieving technical accuracy for code snippets and usage instructions](https://fathom.video/share/9WGGG9Bb4reaWiHuPc5-HaosCfz4XSbA?tab=summary&timestamp=292.0)
  - [Solution: Focus on concepts behind concepts (e.g., knowledge graph for D-Graph) to build topical authority](https://fathom.video/share/9WGGG9Bb4reaWiHuPc5-HaosCfz4XSbA?tab=summary&timestamp=385.0)

### Content Perspective and Uniqueness

  - [Feedback: Content feels generic, lacks point of view](https://fathom.video/share/9WGGG9Bb4reaWiHuPc5-HaosCfz4XSbA?tab=summary&timestamp=631.0)
  - [Suggestion: Incorporate client's perspective (e.g., 5-minute voice notes on topics)](https://fathom.video/share/9WGGG9Bb4reaWiHuPc5-HaosCfz4XSbA?tab=summary&timestamp=780.0)
  - [Potential resource: Access to Aembit's recorded sales calls for authentic voice/angle](https://fathom.video/share/9WGGG9Bb4reaWiHuPc5-HaosCfz4XSbA?tab=summary&timestamp=788.0)

### GrowthX Platform Showcase

  - [New platform launch with integrated workflows](https://fathom.video/share/9WGGG9Bb4reaWiHuPc5-HaosCfz4XSbA?tab=summary&timestamp=836.0)
  - [Features:](https://fathom.video/share/9WGGG9Bb4reaWiHuPc5-HaosCfz4XSbA?tab=summary&timestamp=880.0)
      - [Artifacts: Templates, guidelines, personas dynamically pulled into workflows](https://fathom.video/share/9WGGG9Bb4reaWiHuPc5-HaosCfz4XSbA?tab=summary&timestamp=880.0)
      - [Pipelines: Multi-step content generation process](https://fathom.video/share/9WGGG9Bb4reaWiHuPc5-HaosCfz4XSbA?tab=summary&timestamp=900.0)
      - [Fact-checking staff: Verifies content against multiple sources, including client's domain](https://fathom.video/share/9WGGG9Bb4reaWiHuPc5-HaosCfz4XSbA?tab=summary&timestamp=987.0)
      - [AI Editor: Allows for quick adjustments (e.g., brand alignment)](https://fathom.video/share/9WGGG9Bb4reaWiHuPc5-HaosCfz4XSbA?tab=summary&timestamp=1080.0)
      - [Expert hub (in development)](https://fathom.video/share/9WGGG9Bb4reaWiHuPc5-HaosCfz4XSbA?tab=summary&timestamp=1105.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Schedule 1-hour deep dive with Marcel and team to rethink approach without losing momentum](https://fathom.video/share/9WGGG9Bb4reaWiHuPc5-HaosCfz4XSbA?tab=summary&timestamp=540.0)
  - [Implement system for incorporating Aembit's perspective into content (e.g., voice notes)](https://fathom.video/share/9WGGG9Bb4reaWiHuPc5-HaosCfz4XSbA?tab=summary&timestamp=780.0)
  - [Explore access to Aembit's sales call recordings for authentic voice/context](https://fathom.video/share/9WGGG9Bb4reaWiHuPc5-HaosCfz4XSbA?tab=summary&timestamp=788.0)
  - [Continue refining GrowthX platform features to address technical accuracy and content uniqueness](https://fathom.video/share/9WGGG9Bb4reaWiHuPc5-HaosCfz4XSbA?tab=summary&timestamp=825.0)
